description: Lock Early Warehouse Management to rail-linked grain elevator receipt accounting rather than later motorized depot logistics.

checks.reason: EH.Net anchors high-volume grain elevator and railroad storage in the 1840s, with 1850s grain-port growth and documented receipt-based grain finance before the mid-1860s.
The scoped node depends on rail-linked high-volume grain storage and shipment.
Motorized logistics is later freight-distribution infrastructure, not a prerequisite for mid-nineteenth-century warehouse receipts, scale tickets, customer accounts, and grain elevator records.
